message:
refactor(browser): Add OPFS-only storage, default for LocalDatabase

- Add OPFSStorage class for pure OPFS file access
- No IndexedDB migration needed as data grows
- Uses sync access handle for better performance when available
- Supports nested directories (db/table/fragment pattern)
- LocalDatabase now defaults to opfsStorage instead of datasetStorage
- Legacy DatasetStorage kept for backward compatibility

Benefits of OPFS-only:
- No migration complexity
- Better performance for file-like access
- Same approach as SQLite WASM
- No size-based storage switching
